data.content: PLAN COMPLETE. Add a git-based trailing notice to the skills updater so the daily updater stops silently leaving tracked SKILL.md files dirty. Approach: after write_skills in update_managed (managed_skills_ops.rs:51-83), call a new changed_tracked_paths(repo_root, &updated_paths) helper (new module managed_skills_git.rs, shells `git -C <repo> status --porcelain -- <paths>`, returns dirty subset, empty on any git failure). If non-empty, append format_commit_notice(repo_root, dirty) (new fn in managed_skills_output.rs) to the returned output. All managed destinations are Project-scope inside the repo. Tests in managed_skills_tests_ext.rs (real git repos): positive (committed stale skill -> update rewrites -> notice), negative (clean -> no notice), non-repo (no notice/no error). Respect <500/<100/<100 limits and 95% coverage; run make sanity before merge. Scope = update path only; install can adopt the helper later.
